title: Legs, Bums and Tums
description: Combine boxing moves with invigorating aerobic exercise to get a great all-over workout in a safe, non-competitive environment. Boxfit classes deliver a one-two punch of intense physical activity and a motivating environment to train your way to fighting fitness.
address: South Norwood Leisure Centre, Studio 1, Studios, South Norwood, London

title: Core Conditioning
description: These low impact classes really help to improve the body's core strength and posture. Our dedicated team of Fitness Instructors use a range of innovative equipment and body weight exercises designed to develop your core muscles.
address: South Norwood Leisure Centre, Studio 1, Studios, South Norwood, London

title: Power Pump
description: Get your body pumping to a driving beat with one of our motivating pump fitness classes. Fusing high-energy routines with challenging weights, our pump workouts are a full-body blast that will put you on the fast track to fitness.
address: South Norwood Leisure Centre, Studio 1, Studios, South Norwood, London

title: Tai Chi
description: Push your workout to the next level with high intensity circuit training. Circuit routines provide a rigorous, all-body workout as you tackle a sequence of physical challenges designed to get you fitter and stronger.

title: Mindfulness
description:
Mindfulness is a relaxing and self-focused class where participants experience a range of guided meditations and learn the importance of being ‘still’. Mindfulness is the basic human ability to be fully present, aware of where we are and what we’re doing, and not overly reactive or overwhelmed by what’s going on around us.

Date: Fri 03 Jul 2026

Time: 07:30pm - 08:30pm (60min)

Instructor: Shantelle

Location: Studio 1, Studios, South Norwood Leisure Centre

Price: N/A
address: South Norwood Leisure Centre, Studio 1, Studios
